item_text: users can log in and out, add and remove products from their cart, and check out.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-localuser-003 title: verify localuser can add and remove products from cart module: localuser source pages: 2 preconditions: localuser is logged in. test data: product name = "producta", price = 10.99 test steps: 1. localuser adds a product to their cart. 2. cart updates to include the new product. 3. localuser removes the product from their cart. 4. cart updates to exclude the product. expected result: cart correctly reflects the addition and removal of products.

item_text: admins can log in and out, add and remove products from their cart, and check out.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-admin-003 title: verify admin can add and remove products from cart module: admin source pages: 2 preconditions: admin is logged in. test data: product name = "productb", price = 20.99 test steps: 1. admin adds a product to their cart. 2. cart updates to include the new product. 3. admin removes the product from their cart. 4. cart updates to exclude the product. expected result: cart correctly reflects the addition and removal of products.

item_text: the system has a product that can be added to and removed from a cart.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-cart-001 title: verify cart can add and remove products module: cart source pages: 2 preconditions: product exists. test data: product name = "productc", price = 15.99 test steps: 1. add product to cart. 2. cart updates to include the new product. 3. remove product from cart. 4. cart updates to exclude the product. expected result: cart correctly reflects the addition and removal of products.
